allow:
Bash(node -e "require\('sharp'\)" 2>/dev/null && echo "sharp available" || echo "no sharp"
node -e "require\('jimp'\)" 2>/dev/null && echo "jimp available" || echo "no jimp"
python --version 2>/dev/null || python3 --version 2>/dev/null || echo "no python")
Bash(python -c "import pdf2image; print\('pdf2image ok'\)" 2>/dev/null || python -c "import fitz; print\('pymupdf ok'\)" 2>/dev/null || echo "keine PDF-Bibliothek installiert")
Bash(python -c "import fitz; print\('pymupdf ok, version:', fitz.__version__\)")

Bash(python - <<'EOF'
import fitz
import os

pdf_path = "/c/Users/kapla/Desktop/Atesh media/ATESH GRILL & RESTAURANT Menukarte v7.pdf"
out_dir = "/c/Users/kapla/astro-atesh/public/images/menu"

os.makedirs\(out_dir, exist_ok=True\)

doc = fitz.open\(pdf_path\)
print\(f"Seiten: {len\(doc\)}"\)

for i, page in enumerate\(doc\):
    mat = fitz.Matrix\(2.0, 2.0\)  # 2x zoom = ~144 DPI
    pix = page.get_pixmap\(matrix=mat\)
    out_path = f"{out_dir}/seite_{i+1:02d}.jpg"
    pix.save\(out_path, jpg_quality=88\)
    print\(f"  Seite {i+1}: {pix.width}x{pix.height}px -> {out_path}"\)

doc.close\(\)
print\("Fertig!"\)
EOF)

Bash(python - <<'EOF'
import fitz
import os

pdf_path = r"C:\\Users\\kapla\\Desktop\\Atesh media\\ATESH GRILL & RESTAURANT Menukarte v7.pdf"
out_dir = r"C:\\Users\\kapla\\astro-atesh\\public\\images\\menu"

os.makedirs\(out_dir, exist_ok=True\)

doc = fitz.open\(pdf_path\)
print\(f"Seiten: {len\(doc\)}"\)

for i, page in enumerate\(doc\):
    mat = fitz.Matrix\(2.0, 2.0\)
    pix = page.get_pixmap\(matrix=mat\)
    out_path = os.path.join\(out_dir, f"seite_{i+1:02d}.jpg"\)
    pix.save\(out_path, jpg_quality=88\)
    print\(f"  Seite {i+1}: {pix.width}x{pix.height}px -> {out_path}"\)

doc.close\(\)
print\("Fertig!"\)
EOF)
